reasoning: The control CM-8 - System Component Inventory is focused on maintaining an inventory of system components, which is a management and compliance task typically handled outside of Kubernetes. Kubernetes itself does not inherently manage or maintain an inventory of system components like cloud instances or virtual machines. Instead, it orchestrates containerized applications and resources. This control is more aligned with cloud provider services that manage infrastructure inventory and compliance, such as AWS SSM or Azure Automation. Therefore, there is no direct Kubernetes security check that maps to this control.
title: System Component Inventory
